g_demo_tool.statement: Build a working single-user agentic project planning tool.
success_metrics: Create/edit/retrieve a project plan via CLI
Pause and resume execution after hours/days

g_consistency.statement: Enforce consistent collaboration workflow via schema and deterministic gating.

r_interactive_planning.statement: User can outline goals and collaborate with system to produce a plan.
acceptance_criteria: System drafts work items from goals
System asks clarification questions when blockers detected

r_persistence.statement: Project plan is persisted and can be retrieved and modified.
acceptance_criteria: Create → store → retrieve yields equivalent object
